implementation_notes: selfHealMessages function added to chatPersistence.ts (lines 92-177). Case 3 detection uses explicit sha256+url-missing check; Case 1 uses envelopePattern regex; Case 2 uses canonicalIdPattern.
loadMessages modified to run self-heal for DM threads: groupId.startsWith('dm:') gate, healed marker check via getHealedThreads(), call selfHealMessages, persist with set() + markHealed().
getHealedThreads() and markHealed() added to chatPersistence.ts for the localStorage healed-marker CRUD operations. HEALED_MARKER_KEY = 'lp_dmHealed_v1'.
loadMessages returns { messages, refetchIds } so caller (ContactChat) can handle Case 2 refetch asynchronously.
parseDirectPayload imported from directMessages.ts for Case 1 envelope decoding.
Idempotency: markHealed always called after selfHealMessages, even when needsRewrite=false. getHealedThreads() early-return gates subsequent runs.

files_changed.change: ADDED selfHealMessages (lines 92-177), getHealedThreads (lines 47-54), markHealed (lines 56-66), HEALED_MARKER_KEY constant (line 38); MODIFIED loadMessages (lines 194-238) to gate on dm: thread and run self-heal pass

ac_coverage.AC-23: ✓ loadMessages gates on groupId.startsWith('dm:'); getHealedThreads() + markHealed() implement per-thread lp_dmHealed_v1 marker; second loadMessages skips pass (early exit)
ac_coverage.AC-24: ✓ selfHealMessages rewrites envelope-in-content via envelopePattern match, parseDirectPayload, spread {...msg, content, attachments} — id/createdAt unchanged
ac_coverage.AC-25: ✓ Non-canonical ids pushed to refetchIds array; rows passed through unchanged; refetchIds returned to caller for async refetch coordination
ac_coverage.AC-26: ✓ Case 3: isOrphanedSelfImage = hasSha256 && urlIsMissing && senderPubkey===ownPubkeyHex → null return → filter removes row
ac_coverage.AC-27: ✓ Idempotency: markHealed always called; getHealedThreads early-return; unit test at selfHeal.test.ts:417-528
ac_coverage.AC-29: ✓ dm-self-heal.spec.ts: seedMalformedRow, open chat, assert decoded, reload, assert persisted, IDB inspection

spec_compliance.§3.4_order_of_operations: loadMessages → get from IDB → self-heal pass → markHealed → return {messages, refetchIds}
spec_compliance.case1_envelope_in_content: envelopePattern regex match → parseDirectPayload → spread rewrite, id/createdAt unchanged
spec_compliance.case2_non_canonical_id: canonicalIdPattern test → push to refetchIds → rows left in place
spec_compliance.case3_orphaned_optimistic_image: hasSha256 && urlMissing && sender===own → null return → filter removes row
spec_compliance.healed_marker_per_thread: lp_dmHealed_v1 stores JSON array of threadIds; getHealedTracks() reads; markHealed() appends

RETROSPECTIVE.note: The vi.mock context-window issue caused the subagent to hit its context limit before completing all artifact files. The implementation itself (chatPersistence.ts selfHealMessages, loadMessages self-heal gate, markHealed, getHealedThreads) was written by the lead directly. Artifact files were created by the lead after the subagent completed.
